HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

File List
Here is a list of all files with brief descriptions:
[detail level 12]
 ▼ include
 Bsp3D.h3D Binary Space Partitioning (BSP) utilities for triangle meshes
 CLParser.hMinimal command-line argument parsing utilities
 Dipole.hIncident field generator for electric dipole illumination in homogeneous or layered media
 Domain.hAbstract simulation domain class for SIE scattering
 DomainHom3D.hHomogeneous 3D simulation domain (derived from Domain)
 DomainHom3DPer.hHomogeneous 3D domain with in‑plane periodicity (derived from DomainHom3D)
 DomainLayered3D.hLayered 3D simulation domain (derived from Domain)
 Gaussian.hIncident field: paraxial Gaussian beam in a homogeneous medium
 GaussQuad.hGaussian quadrature helpers for Green's functions and incident fields
 globals.hGlobal numerical constants, fundamental types, and simple macros
 GreenF.hAbstract base class for electromagnetic Green's functions
 GreenFHom3D.h3D scalar/dyadic Green's function in a homogeneous background
 GreenFHom3DPer.hPeriodic homogeneous 3D Green's function (abstract base)
 GreenFHom3DPer2D.hPeriodic homogeneous 3D Green's function with 2D in‑plane periodicity
 GreenFLayered3D.hLayered‑medium 3D Green's function (scalar/gradient/dyadic) + RWG integrals
 IncidentField.hAbstract interface for incident electromagnetic excitations
 iofunctions.hSmall helper templates for reading whitespace-separated values from text files while skipping line comments
 JobParser.hLightweight XML-like tag parser for the solver job file
 LayeredMediaUtils.hThis header declares utility structures and algorithms used throughout the layered-media scattering solver
 mathFunctions.hHeader file of the class that provides auxiliary mathematical functionalities for the SIE solver
 PlaneWave.hDefines the PlaneWave class: representation of a plane‐wave incident field
 quadrature.hDeclarations of Dunavant (triangle) and Gauss–Legendre (1D) quadrature rules
 RWGFun.hHeader for the RWGFun class
 SIEForm.hHeader for the SIEForm class
 SIEFormPMCHW.hHeader file for the SIEFormPMCHW class
 SimJob.hOrchestrates a full simulation run: parse job/subjobs, build the linear system, solve it, and optionally post-process fields
 SingCancellation.hQuadrature point/weight builders for singularity-cancellation on triangles
 SingSub.hExact subtractions for singular/near-singular triangle integrals
 SommerfeldIntegrator.hDeclaration of the SommerfeldIntegrator class, which evaluates Sommerfeld-type integrals for layered media Green's functions
 SurfaceMesh.hDeclaration of the SurfaceMesh class and mesh edge struct
 Triangle.hDeclaration of the Triangle class (surface element with cached geometry)
 TriQuadPol.hPolar quadrature on a single triangle around an observation point
 ▼ src
 Bsp3D.cppImplementation of a minimal 3D BSP tree for triangle meshes
 casimir.cppMain entry point for the HELIOS Casimir force routine
 Dipole.cppImplementation of the Dipole incident source
 Domain.cppImplementation of the Domain base class
 DomainHom3D.cppImplementation of the homogeneous 3D domain
 DomainHom3DPer.cppImplementation of the homogeneous, periodically replicated 3D domain
 DomainLayered3D.cppImplementation of the layered 3D domain
 Gaussian.cppImplementation of the paraxial Gaussian beam incident field
 globals.cppDefinitions for global constants declared in globals.h
 GreenF.cppImplementation of the GreenF base class
 GreenFHom3D.cppImplementation of the 3D Green's Function class in a homogeneous background
 GreenFHom3DPer.cppImplementation of the periodic homogeneous 3D Green's function base
 GreenFHom3DPer2D.cppImplementation of the 2D-periodic homogeneous 3D Green's function
 GreenFLayered3D.cppImplementation of the 3D Green's Function class in a layered background
 IncidentField.cppMinimal implementation pieces for IncidentField
 JobParser.cppImplementation of the lightweight tag parser used for job files
 LayeredMediaUtils.cppImplementation for the LayeredMediaUtils class
 main.cppThis is the main file for the HELIOS program
 mainpp.cppThis is the main file for the HELIOS program, specifically the post-processing portion
 maintable.cppCommand-line utility to generate, read, and write periodic error-function lookup tables used in the SIE solver

 PlaneWave.cppImplementation for the PlaneWave class

 SimJob.cppImplementation for the SimJob class
 SingCancellation.cppImplementation of the singularity-cancellation paired quadrature builders
 SingSub.cppImplementation of exact edge/surface integrals and K1–K4 kernels
